definitions.text:
[gây sức ép] to put pressure on somebody; to bring pressure to bear on somebody; to pressurize; to squeeze 
 Gây sức ép với các con nợ để họ trả nợ càng sớm càng tốt 
 To put pressure on one's debtors to pay debts as soon as possible; to pressurize one's debtors into paying debts as soon as possible

@gây chuyện
- (cũng nói gây sự) Be quarrelsome, pick a quarrel (with somebody)

be quarrelsome, pick a quarrel (with somebody)
